verses.text: “Siampi ahi Levi minam khempeuh in Israel-te bangin tanh ahi a, luah ahi zongin neilo ding uh a, amaute in Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biaknate leh a kaih ngeite uh ne ding uh hi
Amaute in a sanggamte uh lakah gamhluah neilo ding uh a, amah in amaute tungah a ciam mah bangin Topa pen amaute' luah ahi hi
“Bawng hita leh tuu hita leh biakna-in a pia mite' tung panin siampite' kaih dingte: Amaute in siampite' tungah a liang leh a paang nihte leh a gilpi pia ding uh hi
Na anpal, na leenggahzu, na sathau, leh na meet masak uh na tuumul uh na pia ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Levi minamte Topa' na a sem tawntung dingin na minam khempeuh uh sung panin Topa na Pasian un a teel ahi hi
“Levi mi khat, Israel-te sung na khuapi uh khat peuhpeuh ahi ama ten'na panin ama ut hun peuh ciangin Topa' teelna munah hong pai thei ding hi
Tua ciangin Topa' mai-ah nasem dingin a om a lawm Levi midangte khempeuh mah bangin Topa a Pasian' min tawh na sem thei ding hi
Amah in a gamhluah a zuakna pan a sum ngahte banah nek ding a kikimin amaute tawh tanh ngahkhawm ding hi.
“ Topa na Pasian un note hong piak leitangah na tun' uh ciangin, tua minamte' gamtatna a kihhuaite zuih ding na kisin kei ding uh hi
Note lakah a tanu ahi a, a tapa ahi zongin biakna-in a zang, ai a saan, khong a khai, mailam thu a gen, ai a tawi
bum a zang, van a kah, sikhate tawh a kiho, sikha thu a dong kuamah na om kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh hihte a hih mi peuhmah Topa-a' dingin a kihhuai ahi hi. Hih bang a kihhuai gamtatnate hangin note' mai panin Topa na Pasian un amaute hawlkhia hi
Note pen Topa na Pasian uh mai-ah paubaang loin na om ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh note in na suankhiat ding uh hih minamte in khongkhaite leh aisante thu ngai uh hi. Ahih hangin note ahih leh tua bangin na gamtat ding uh Topa na Pasian un hong phallo hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Moses tawh a kibang Kamsang khat Pasian in Kham

verses.text: “ Topa na Pasian un note lak ahi na sanggamte uh lak panin note-a' dingin kei tawh a kibang kamsang khat hong khangsak ding hi. Note in ama thu na ngai ding uh hi

“Note in, ‘Si khading ka hih manun Topa kote' Pasian' aw hong zasak kik kei in. Hih a lian mei zong hong musak nawn kei in,’ ci-in na kikhop ni-un Horeb-ah Topa na Pasian uh tung pan na deih bang uh hi ding hi
Topa in kei kiangah, ‘Amaute' hong ngetna thuman taktak hi
Amau sanggamte lak panin nang tawh a kibang kamsang khat amaute-a' dingin ka khangsak ding hi. Ama gen dingte ka hilh ding a, amah ka thupiak khempeuh amaute tungah a gen ding hi
Amah in keima min tawh a gen ka thute a donlo mi peuhmahte keimahmah in ka thuk ding hi
Ahih hangin keimah in thugen dingin thu pialo napi-in keima min tawh thu a gen ngam kamsangpa hita leh pasian dangte' min tawh thu a genpa hita leh, tua bang mite si ding hi,’ hong ci hi
“Na lungsim sung uhah, ‘ Topa' gen a hilo thu bangci theih ding ihi hiam?’ na cih uh leh

kamsang khat in Topa' min tawh thu genin, tua thu pen hong tunglo ahi a, a manlo ahi zongin hong hih leh, tua thu pen Topa' genloh thu ahi hi. Kamsangpa in ama utthu a gen hi a, amah na kihtak ding uh kullo hi.
